sections.heading:
Fly Anywhere.
Pay Less with Altovia.
sections.subheading: Altovia is the flight app that finds you insanely cheap flights in seconds — economy, business class, and first class deals included. No more tab hell. Just tap, book, fly.

sections.heading: Why Altovia is Amazing
sections.subheading: We built the flight app we always wished existed.

items.title: Ridiculously Cheap Flights
items.description: Altovia scans hundreds of airlines and routes in real-time to surface the cheapest fares available — including business class and first class deals you'd never find on your own.

items.title: Instant AI Search
items.description: Just tell Altovia where you want to go. Our AI searches, compares, and recommends the best options in seconds — no forms, no tabs, no stress.

items.title: AI Trip Planner
items.description: Beyond flights, Altovia plans your whole trip — local hotspots, hidden gems, itineraries tailored to your vibe. Like having a travel expert on speed dial.

items.title: Points & Miles Optimiser
items.description: Connect your loyalty programs and let Altovia spot the award redemptions you'd miss. Get first class flights using miles you forgot you had.

items.title: Goodbye Tab Hell
items.description: One app replaces Kayak, Google Flights, Skyscanner, and your points spreadsheet. Everything in a couple of taps — seriously.

items.title: Global Coverage
items.description: From weekend getaways to round-the-world trips, Altovia covers major airlines departing from anywhere. Budget escapes and premium cabin upgrades — all in one place.

sections.heading: Real Trips. Real Savings.
sections.subheading: People who switched from Kayak, Google Flights, and all the rest.

items.quote: I found a business class seat to Tokyo for less than what I used to pay for economy on other apps. Altovia is genuinely unreal. I'm never going back.
items.author: Jessica M.

items.quote: The AI trip planner blew my mind. Told it I wanted a week in Lisbon on a budget — it gave me a full itinerary with local spots I never would've found. Like having a friend who's been everywhere.
items.author: Marcus T.

items.quote: Got a first class flight to Paris using miles I forgot I had. The app basically paid for itself on the first use. Altovia is a game-changer.
items.author: Priya S.

sections.heading: Your Best Trip Yet Starts Here.
sections.description: Download Altovia free. Full access to AI trip planning, cheap flight search, and points optimisation. No credit card. No stress. Just amazing trips.

sections.heading: Got Questions?
sections.subheading: Real talk about how Altovia compares.

items.question: How is Altovia different from Google Flights or Kayak?
items.answer: Google Flights and Kayak are search tools — you fill out forms and scroll results. Altovia is your travel AI: describe what you want, and it searches, plans, and optimises for you. Flights, hotels, activities, points, and local tips — all in one app, no switching required.

items.question: Does Altovia really find cheaper flights?
items.answer: Yes — Altovia searches across major airlines in real-time, including deals that are hard to surface manually. It's especially powerful for business class and award redemptions that most travellers miss.

items.question: What if I already like searching for points deals?
items.answer: Altovia is built for you then. Connect your loyalty programs and it surfaces the best award redemptions across all your accounts — the ones that actually make sense. You still call the shots; Altovia just makes sure you see every option.

items.question: Is Altovia free?
items.answer: Yes — free to download with a 7-day trial of all Pro features. No credit card needed to start. After that, pick a plan that works for how often you travel.

items.question: Is this just another app I won't use?
items.answer: Altovia replaces 4–5 things you already do separately (flight search, price alerts, trip planning, points tracking). It's less apps, not more — and it actually saves you money from day one.
